headline: Interpretability and agent-training techniques including trajectory data, agent skills, and behavioral auditing broke out together this week.
body: A cluster of research techniques moved in unison, led by trajectory data, agent skills, and behavioral auditing, alongside ablation, masking, and long-context work, with feature modulation and feature splitting entering as new outliers. On the policy side, the White House reversed a two-week restriction on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models, lifting export controls that had frozen its most advanced systems, with Fable access set to restore July 1 [4][5][8][10]. Sonnet 5 landed to a critical reception, with one review finding it underperforms Opus 4.8 and GLM-5.2 while costing more [0][3]. Google Cloud demonstrated enterprise agentic orchestration across databases and vector stores using its Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol [1].

cited_items.title: Sonnet 5 (Fully Tested): IT UNDERPERFORMS GLM-5.2 and COSTS MORE!?
